story.iWant: to reorder lessons by dragging them
story.soThat: I can adjust the pedagogical flow easily

tasks.task: Install @dnd-kit dependencies 1.1 Run bun add --exact @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities 1.2 Run bun typecheck to verify no type conflicts 1.3 Document any peer dependency warnings

Create LessonReorder container structure 2.1 Create src/containers/Main/LessonReorder/ directory 2.2 Create connect.ts with reorder mutation and local state management 2.3 Create types.ts with ReorderParams and LessonReorderState interfaces 2.4 Create constants.ts with toast messages and unsaved changes modal text

Implement reorder mutation in connect.ts with manual save 3.1 Implement $api.useMutation('patch', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/reorder') with proper body structure 3.2 Build request body as { lessons: [{ lesson_id, lesson_number }] } from reordered items 3.3 Implement local state (pendingOrder) to track unsaved reorder changes 3.4 Implement handleLocalReorder to update local state without API call 3.5 Implement saveReorder to persist pending changes to API 3.6 Implement discardReorder to discard pending changes 3.7 Implement getReorderState to compute hasUnsavedChanges and displayLessons 3.8 Implement onMutate for optimistic updates (cache snapshot + update) 3.9 Implement onError with rollback to previous lesson order 3.10 Implement onSuccess with toast notification and clear pending order

Create LessonRow component 4.1 Create src/components/LessonRow.tsx 4.2 Integrate useSortable hook from @dnd-kit/sortable 4.3 Apply drag handle using attributes and listeners on GripVertical button 4.4 Style dragging state (transform, opacity, elevated shadow) 4.5 Ensure existing edit/delete callbacks still work

Create SortableLessonList component 5.1 Create src/components/SortableLessonList.tsx 5.2 Wrap table body with DndContext and SortableContext 5.3 Configure closestCenter collision detection strategy 5.4 Implement handleDragEnd callback to notify parent of local reorder 5.5 Create custom DragOverlay for smooth dragging visualization 5.6 Receive already-sorted lessons from parent (displayLessons)

Implement keyboard accessibility 6.1 Configure KeyboardSensor from @dnd-kit with proper activation 6.2 Add useSensors hook with PointerSensor and KeyboardSensor 6.3 Implement keyboard coordinate getter for vertical sorting 6.4 Add aria-describedby announcements for screen readers 6.5 Create announcements prop for DndContext with proper messages

Integrate with CourseDetail container 7.1 Replace LessonList with SortableLessonList in CourseDetail 7.2 Pass displayLessons from reorderState to SortableLessonList 7.3 Add handleLocalReorder, saveReorder, discardReorder to connect.ts 7.4 Add "Save Changes" button that appears when hasUnsavedChanges is true 7.5 Ensure edit/delete modals still function correctly with new structure

Implement unsaved changes confirmation modal 8.1 Intercept navigation (Back to Courses) when hasUnsavedChanges is true 8.2 Show AlertDialog with Save/Discard/Cancel options 8.3 Handle Save and navigate after mutation completes 8.4 Handle Discard to clear pending changes and navigate 8.5 Handle Cancel to close modal and stay on page
Handle edge cases 9.1 Disable drag when only 1 lesson exists 9.2 Reset pending order when lessons data changes externally (add/edit/delete) 9.3 Add loading state during reorder API call

Testing and validation 10.1 Run bun typecheck - verify no type errors 10.2 Run bun lint:fix - verify no lint errors 10.3 Manual test: drag lesson to new position, verify Save Changes button appears 10.4 Manual test: click Save Changes, verify order persists and button disappears 10.5 Manual test: reorder then click Back, verify unsaved changes modal appears 10.6 Manual test: keyboard reorder with Tab → Enter → Arrow → Enter 10.7 Manual test: simulate API error, verify rollback 10.8 Manual test: verify edit/delete still work after reorder 10.9 Manual test: verify toast notifications appear correctly

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given I see the lesson list with 2+ lessons, When I grab a lesson by its drag handle (⋮⋮), Then: - The cursor changes to grabbing - I see visual feedback (ghost element follows cursor) - The lesson row has elevated visual treatment
Given I am dragging a lesson, When I drag over another position, Then: - I see a drop zone indicator (line or highlight between rows) - Other lessons visually shift to make room for the drop target

Given I am dragging a lesson, When I drop the lesson in a new position, Then: - The order updates immediately in the UI (local state) - A "Save Changes" button appears next to "Add Lesson" button - The order is NOT saved to backend until user clicks Save Changes

Given I have pending reorder changes, When I click "Save Changes", Then: - The new order is saved to backend - A brief toast appears: "Order saved" - The "Save Changes" button disappears - The lesson numbers update to reflect new positions
Given a reorder API request fails, Then: - The order reverts to original positions (rollback) - An error toast shows: "Failed to update order. Please try again."

Given I am using keyboard navigation, Then drag-and-drop is accessible: - Tab to focus the drag handle - Enter/Space to start drag mode - Arrow Up/Down to move position - Enter to confirm, Escape to cancel - Screen reader announces: "Lesson [title] moved to position [n]"
Given there is only 1 lesson, Then: - The drag handle is visible but non-functional (disabled state) - No reorder actions are possible

Given I have pending reorder changes, When I click "Back to Courses", Then: - A confirmation modal appears with title "Unsaved Changes" - Modal shows: "You have unsaved changes to the lesson order. Do you want to save them before leaving?" - Three buttons: "Cancel", "Discard", "Save Changes" - Cancel closes modal and stays on page - Discard clears changes and navigates away - Save Changes persists order then navigates away

doc.title: Senda CMS Architecture
doc.snippet: @dnd-kit: Accessible drag-and-drop for lesson reordering. Built for React, fully accessible (keyboard support), flexible and composable, used by shadcn/ui.

doc.title: Senda CMS Architecture
doc.snippet: Container pattern separates business logic (connect.ts) from presentation (index.tsx). All API calls, form handling, and side effects go in connect.ts. NO business logic in index.tsx.

doc.title: Senda CMS Architecture
doc.snippet: React Query for server state. Optimistic updates for mutations with onMutate/onError/onSuccess pattern. staleTime: 5min, gcTime: 10min.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Reorder Lessons: Drag-and-drop using drag handle. Visual feedback: Ghost placeholder, smooth animation. Auto-save: Order persists immediately. Undo option: Toast with "Undo reorder" for 5 seconds.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Keyboard Navigation: All interactive elements accessible via Tab. Focus indicators visible (cyan ring 2px, offset 2px). Drag-and-drop has alternative keyboard reorder (Arrow keys + modifier).

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Success Messages: Toast notification (top-right), green background (#9ece6a), 4 seconds auto-dismiss. Error Messages: Red/pink background (#f7768e), 6 seconds.

doc.title: Epic 3: Lesson Management
doc.snippet: Mutation: $api.useMutation('patch', '/api/courses/{id}/lessons/reorder'). Request body: { lesson_ids: ['id1', 'id2', 'id3'] } (ordered array). Implement keyboard accessibility per @dnd-kit documentation. Optimistic update with React Query onMutate / onError rollback.

doc.title: Project AI Instructions
doc.snippet: Optimistic updates + cache invalidation pattern with onMutate (cancel queries, snapshot, optimistic update), onError (rollback), onSuccess (toast, invalidate).

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Support reordering of lessons. Display lessons within a course. Show lesson status and progress.

file.reason: Current lesson list component to be replaced/extended with sortable version. Contains Table structure, sort logic, and LessonListItem rendering.
Individual lesson row with GripVertical drag handle (currently disabled). Needs to be wrapped by LessonRow for DnD functionality.
Main orchestration for CourseDetail. Add handleReorderLessons callback and integrate with SortableLessonList. Contains lessons query and refetchLessons.
Main course detail view that renders LessonList. Replace LessonList with SortableLessonList component.
OpenAPI client for mutations. Use $api.useMutation('patch', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/reorder') for reorder API call.
Lesson type with id, lessonNumber, title, status, etc. Used for sorting and identifying lessons in reorder.
Status badge component used in lesson rows. Must remain functional after DnD integration.

ecosystem.name: node
ecosystem.package: Core drag and drop library for React
React Query for mutations and cache
Form handling (not directly used but context)
Icons including GripVertical for drag handle

interface.name: PATCH /api/courses/{slug}/lessons/reorder
ReorderLessonsRequest
useSortable hook
DndContext + SortableContext
interface.signature: <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd} accessibility={{ announcements }} > <SortableContext items={lessonIds} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}> {children} </SortableContext> <DragOverlay>{activeLesson}</DragOverlay> </DndContext>

constraints.constraint: Container Pattern: All reorder mutation logic goes in connect.ts. SortableLessonList and LessonRow are presentational components receiving handlers as props.
OpenAPI-First: Use $api.useMutation from openapi-react-query. Never write manual fetch calls. Request body must match ReorderLessonsRequest schema exactly.
Optimistic Updates: Implement onMutate to capture previous state and update cache optimistically. Implement onError to rollback. Implement onSuccess for toast and optional cache invalidation.
WCAG 2.1 AA: Full keyboard navigation for drag-and-drop. Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate, Arrow keys to move, Enter to confirm, Escape to cancel. Screen reader announcements required.
Use Tailwind CSS classes only. Drag states: cursor-grab/cursor-grabbing, opacity-50 while dragging, shadow-lg for elevation, border-primary for active.
Run bun typecheck before PR. Manual testing required for drag, keyboard, error states, and integration with edit/delete modals.
ESLint enforces import order: builtin → external → @/* internal → relative. Use consistent type imports: import type { Foo } from 'bar'

tests.standards: Project uses manual testing for UI interactions. Run bun typecheck for type validation and bun lint:fix for linting. Playwright tests exist but focus on E2E flows. For this story, manual testing covers drag-and-drop, keyboard accessibility, manual save flow, unsaved changes modal, and error rollback scenarios.

ideas.idea: Manual: Click and drag lesson row by handle, verify cursor change and ghost element appears
Manual: While dragging, hover over other positions, verify drop indicator line appears
Manual: Drop lesson in new position, verify list reorders and Save Changes button appears
Manual: Click Save Changes, verify toast appears and button disappears
Manual: Simulate network error (disable network in DevTools), attempt save, verify rollback and error toast
Manual: Tab to drag handle, press Enter, use Arrow keys to move, press Enter to confirm, verify screen reader announcements
Manual: With only 1 lesson, verify drag handle is visible but disabled (cursor-not-allowed)
Manual: Reorder lessons, click Back to Courses, verify unsaved changes modal appears with 3 options
Manual: In modal, click Cancel, verify stays on page with changes intact
Manual: In modal, click Discard, verify navigates without saving
Manual: In modal, click Save Changes, verify saves then navigates
Regression: After reorder, verify edit and delete buttons still work correctly
Regression: Verify status badges display correctly after reorder
Regression: Add/edit/delete a lesson, verify pending order is reset
